lobby.name: Resort Lobby
lobby.description: The Grand Palm Resort lobby. Dust sheets drape the furniture and a chandelier sways with no breeze. Mr. Crane, the caretaker, hovers behind the front desk.

navigation_links.label: Janitor's Closet
navigation_links.locked_message: The janitor's closet door is locked tight. A heavy old lock — you'd need the right key.

clickable_hotspots.label: Locked Closet Door
clickable_hotspots.missing_item_message: The janitor's closet. The lock is old but sturdy — no key, no entry.

action_triggers.text: The key turns with a rusty CLUNK. The janitor's closet is open! Head west to look inside.
Inside the drawer: a heavy old flashlight. It still works! Added to inventory.

clickable_hotspots.label: Guest Ledger
clickable_hotspots.wrong_character_message: Rows of cramped, faded bookkeeping. Deciphering this is a job for Velma.

action_triggers.text: Velma: 'Jinkies! According to this ledger, the resort is drowning in debt... and someone's been billing supplies to a room that doesn't exist.'
A sun-bleached poster: 'GRAND PALM RESORT — Paradise Awaits!' Someone has scrawled a glowing green figure over the pool with the words: THE PHANTOM GUEST CHECKS IN, YOU CHECK OUT.

grounds.name: Resort Grounds
grounds.description: Overgrown gardens surround a drained, cracked swimming pool. A toolshed slumps in the shadows, and Janitor Gus rakes the same spot of dead leaves over and over.

action_triggers.text: You fish a long, sturdy stick out of the bushes. You never know when a good stick will come in handy.

clickable_hotspots.label: Old Vending Machine
clickable_hotspots.wrong_character_message: An ancient vending machine with one Scooby Snax box dangling on the spiral. It won't budge. Shaking loose snacks is a job for Shaggy and Scooby.

action_triggers.text: Shaggy and Scooby rattle the machine like maniacs! Out drops a box of Scooby Snax... and a pack of extra-sticky chewing gum wedged under the flap. 'Like, jackpot!'

clickable_hotspots.label: Dark Toolshed
clickable_hotspots.missing_item_message: The toolshed is pitch black inside. Without a light you can't see a thing — something skitters in the dark. Zoinks.

action_triggers.text: The flashlight beam sweeps the shed... There! Something metal glints beneath the floor grate. A key! But the gap is far too narrow for fingers.

clickable_hotspots.label: Floor Grate (something glints below)
clickable_hotspots.missing_item_message: The key is wedged deep under the grate. Your arm can't fit — you need something long, thin, and sticky to fish it out.

action_triggers.text: You lower the gummy stick through the grate... steady... GOT IT! A brass key stamped 'MAINTENANCE'. This must open the janitor's closet in the lobby.
The pool has been empty for years, but there are fresh footprints in the leaf muck at the bottom... leading toward the lobby. Ghosts don't leave sneaker prints.

janitor_closet.name: Janitor's Closet
janitor_closet.description: A cramped closet reeking of bleach and something... chemical. Shelves sag with supplies, a coil of rope hangs on the wall, and a padlocked grate is set into the floor.

navigation_links.label: Boiler Room
navigation_links.locked_message: A padlocked grate blocks the way down. The lock is rusted but stubborn.

clickable_hotspots.label: Shadowy Back Shelf
clickable_hotspots.missing_item_message: The back shelves are lost in shadow. You can make out cans of... something. Too dark to read the labels.

action_triggers.text: The beam lands on a half-empty can of LUMO-GLOW PHANTOM GREEN theatrical paint — the exact eerie green of the Phantom Guest! You take the can as evidence.
A long coil of sturdy rope. Freddy would be proud — this is prime trap-building material.

clickable_hotspots.label: Padlocked Floor Grate
clickable_hotspots.wrong_character_message: A rusty padlock seals the floor grate. Warm air and a faint green glow seep up from below. Picking locks is Daphne's department.

action_triggers.text: Daphne slides a hairpin from her hair and works the padlock... click... CLICK! 'And Freddy says I'm danger-prone.' The way down to the boiler room is open!
A crumpled invoice: '6 cans LUMO-GLOW paint — CHARGED TO ROOM 217.' Wait... the ledger said the resort doesn't HAVE a room 217. Somebody's hiding purchases.

trap_room.name: Boiler Room (Trap Room)
trap_room.description: The boiler room glows sickly green — glowing footprints everywhere! A bedsheet 'costume' hangs by the furnace. An iron hook juts from a ceiling beam above a bait-sized crate, next to a big red lever marked 'LAUNDRY NET'.

clickable_hotspots.label: Iron Ceiling Hook
clickable_hotspots.missing_item_message: A sturdy iron hook juts from the beam, right above the crate. Perfect for rigging a net trap... if you had a rope.

action_triggers.text: You string the rope through the hook and rig the old laundry net above the crate. One tug of the lever and WHOOSH — instant phantom piñata.

clickable_hotspots.label: Bait Crate
clickable_hotspots.wrong_character_message: The crate sits right under the net. It needs bait — and nobody arranges a Scooby Snack more irresistibly than Shaggy and Scooby.
clickable_hotspots.missing_item_message: The crate sits right under the net. It needs bait. Something no phantom with taste could resist... like a Scooby Snack.

action_triggers.text: Shaggy balances the Scooby Snack on the crate at the perfect tempting angle. Scooby whimpers: 'Rye rye, rittle ruddy...' The trap is baited!
A bedsheet cut with eye holes, soaked in glowing green paint. Still wet. The Phantom Guest will be back for it soon — better spring the trap before then!

clickable_hotspots.label: Red Lever — 'LAUNDRY NET'
clickable_hotspots.locked_message: Not yet! To spring the trap you need: the rope net rigged on the hook, a Scooby Snack set as bait, and enough EVIDENCE to know who's under that sheet. (Psst — has anyone shown the glowing paint to Gus?)
